title: Brainstorm and lock the build brief
summary: Turn the raw idea into a trustworthy build brief before implementation begins.
acceptance: The brief names the user, problem, outcome, and core flow.
The brief records constraints, assumptions, and a visible completion bar.
The summary is short enough to resend every iteration without noise.
notes: Reduce ambiguity instead of preserving it.
If the source idea is vague, write down assumptions explicitly.
